title: Tax return instructions
description: Listing of individual tax return instructions for paper forms by year.
keywords: TaxPack, tax return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Publications from 1984–2012 are in our Publications Ordering Service (POS). Use the link in this content to access the archive or go to the website (at iorder.com.au) and search for the title, NAT number or year of the publication.
Alternatively to find a publication select the income year group, select the income year, and then select the publication.

content_text:
Publications from 1984–2012 are in our Publications Ordering Service (POS). Use the link in this content to access the archive or go to the website (at iorder.com.au) and search for the title, NAT number or year of the publication.
